title: campanula alliariifolia var. macrophylla
intro: Campanula alliariifolia var. macrophylla, also known as the Large-leaved Bellflower, is a plant species in the bellflower family (Campanulaceae). This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Campanula alliariifolia var. macrophylla include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and alleviate symptoms associated with colds and flu. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
